description: Fetch the resolved member list for a space. The authenticated user must have ReadMemberList access unless the space has public members. Returns the effective member list with access levels, plus any remote spaces that could not be resolved.

arbiterDid.description: DID of the arbiter managing the space.

spaceKey.description: Key of the space to query.

resolverDepth.description: Maximum depth for resolving remote space members. Defaults to 3.

errors.name: ArbiterNotExists
errors.description: No arbiter with this DID exists.

errors.name: SpaceNotExists
errors.description: The referenced space does not exist.

errors.name: PermissionDenied
errors.description: The user does not have ReadMemberList access and the members list is not public.
